resolver_impl.code_grammar: lowercase prefix + one-or-more digits; anything else returns empty string (server) or null (client)

resolver_cases.subject: wallpaper asset
resolver_cases.computation: prefix w → folder wallpaper; rest 91 is all digits; base = getAssetBaseUrl(env)
resolver_cases.client_fallback: resolveWallpaperUrl("w91", payload.assetBaseUrl) at apps/product-shell/src/utils/resolveWallpaper.ts:26 — same algorithm, same output

resolver_cases.subject: sticker tile / exclusive tile content asset
resolver_cases.input_origin: exclusiveTiles[0].contentCode normalised by normalizeExclusiveTile at apps/product-shell/functions/_lib/runtime-schema.js:147 → assetCode validated against ["c","x"]
resolver_cases.computation: prefix c → folder content; rest 1734 is all digits; URL composed

pages_only.operator_override_rule: tile.imageUrl already set (e.g. Tile B) → returned unchanged; resolveAssetUrl is NOT called

resolver_cases.client_fallback: resolveWallpaperUrl does not cover c-prefix tiles; tile imageUrl must be pre-resolved by the server compiler or supplied as inline contentUrl

resolver_cases.subject: asset code present and valid format but object does not exist in R2
resolver_cases.input_origin: hypothetical spec.wallpaper value that passes validateAssetCode but has no corresponding R2 object
resolver_cases.computation: prefix w → folder wallpaper; rest 9999 is all digits; URL is composed correctly; resolver is pure and does not verify object existence

pages_only.network_result: GET /assets/wallpaper/w9999.png → Pages static 404; SPA _redirects catch-all may mask as 200 index.html for non-image MIME contexts

worker_fronted.network_result: Worker receives GET /wallpaper/w9999.png; TENANTS_BUCKET.get("wallpaper/w9999.png") returns null; Worker must return deterministic JSON 404 { ok:false, error:"asset not found", details:{ key:"wallpaper/w9999.png" } }

resolver_cases.invariant: resolver always returns a URL for a valid-format code regardless of object existence; the 404 is observable at the network layer, not silently masked

resolver_cases.subject: worker-fronted bucket fetch — end-to-end network path when ASSET_BASE_URL is set
resolver_cases.resolver_output_path: resolveAssetUrl("w91", { ASSET_BASE_URL:"https://assets.example" }) at runtime-r2.js:64-66 → base is non-empty → ${base}/${folder}/${code}.${ext}

network.routed_by: Cloudflare Worker bound to the host backing ASSET_BASE_URL (external, operator-configured; see cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §3.1 and §3.3 topology T4)
network.binding_consumed: TENANTS_BUCKET (worker-side binding; same logical R2 bucket as Pages Functions consume via env.TENANTS_BUCKET)
network.success_response: 200 image/png; body = R2 object bytes; cache headers per worker policy
network.miss_response: 404 application/json; body = { ok:false, error:"asset not found", details:{ key:"wallpaper/w91.png" } }

manifest_mirror.consumed_by: client resolveWallpaperUrl(code, payload.assetBaseUrl) for any code the server did not pre-resolve

regression_assertions: resolveAssetUrl("", {}) === ""  (empty input → empty string, no URL)
resolveAssetUrl("w9999", {}) === "/assets/wallpaper/w9999.png"  (valid format; existence not checked by resolver)
resolveWallpaperUrl("not-a-code", null) === null  (no valid prefix → null)
compileRuntimePage output for acme-premium/tier-2 with env={}: wallpaperUrl === "/assets/wallpaper/w91.png" AND exclusiveTiles[0].imageUrl === "/assets/content/c1734.png"

compileRuntimePage output for acme-premium/tier-2 with env={ASSET_BASE_URL:"https://assets.example"}: wallpaperUrl === "https://assets.example/wallpaper/w91.png" AND assetBaseUrl === "https://assets.example"
exclusiveTiles[1].imageUrl === "https://cdn.example.com/preview/tile-b.jpg" in both env variants (operator-supplied contentUrl is preserved verbatim, never re-resolved)
exclusiveTiles[2].imageUrl === null in both env variants (no assetCode → resolver not called → null preserved)
/wallpapers/<slug>.png does not appear in any resolved URL; slug is never substituted into an asset path
